title: Digital arrest scam
oneLine: Fake police, CBI or customs video-call you, claim you are under 'digital arrest', and pressure you to pay to avoid jail. No real agency does this.

title: FedEx / courier parcel scam
oneLine: A caller says a parcel in your name holds drugs or fake passports, then transfers you to a 'police officer' who demands money.

title: KYC update scam
oneLine: An SMS or call warns your bank, SIM or wallet KYC has expired and will be blocked, tricking you into an OTP or a fake app.

title: Electricity bill disconnection
oneLine: A text says your power will be cut tonight over an unpaid bill and gives a number to call, where they take remote control of your phone.

title: Investment / trading scam
oneLine: A WhatsApp or Telegram 'expert' promises huge stock or crypto returns; the app shows fake profits but blocks withdrawals.

title: Part-time job / task scam
oneLine: You are offered easy money for liking videos or rating hotels, then asked to 'deposit' funds for bigger tasks that never pay out.

title: Loan-app harassment
oneLine: An instant-loan app grants a small loan, harvests your contacts and photos, then threatens and shames you for repayment.

title: UPI 'wrong payment' refund
oneLine: A stranger claims they sent you money by mistake and asks you to refund it or approve a 'collect request' that pulls money from you.
